content.Text: [Mon 2026-04-20 23:14 PDT] Create a new dashboard page `dashboard/postmortem.html` for AgentLens - an Incident Postmortem Generator. This is an AI agent observability platform. The dashboard already has pages like index.html, alerts.html, runbooks.html, topology.html etc. Look at the existing pages for style conventions - they use `styles.css` and have a consistent header with nav links. ## Feature: Incident Postmortem Generator Build an interactive, self-contained HTML page that helps users generate structured blameless postmortems for agent incidents. Key capabilities: ### 1. Incident Input Form - Incident title, severity (P0-P3), date/time range - Affected agents (multi-select from simulated agent list) - Impact description (textarea) - Detection method dropdown (automated alert, user report, scheduled check, anomaly detection) ### 2. Autonomous Timeline Reconstructor - Auto-generates a plausible incident timeline based on severity and duration - Shows events on a Canvas-rendered horizontal timeline - Events: detection, escalation, investigation, mitigation, resolution, verification - Each event has timestamp, description, owner, and status icon - Users can add/edit/delete timeline events ### 3. Impact Assessment - Auto-calculates impact metrics: estimated affected requests, downtime minutes, error rate spike - Shows impact severity gauge using Canvas (arc gauge) - Cost estimation based on duration and severity ### 4. Contributing Factors Analysis - Auto-suggests contributing factors based on incident type (using predefined rules) - Categories: Human, Process, Technology, External - Each factor has description, likelihood score, preventability rating - Users can add custom factors - Fishbone/Ishikawa-style Canvas visualization ### 5. Action Items Generator - Auto-generates preventive action items based on contributing factors - Each action: description, priority (P0-P3), owner (assignable), due date, status - Sortable/filterable table - Progress tracker showing completion percentage ### 6. Export - Export full postmortem as Markdown, JSON, or HTML - Copy to clipboard button - Print-friendly view ### 7. Presets - 3 preset incident scenarios users can load to see the tool in action: - "Agent Cascade Failure" - P0, multiple agents, long duration - "Model Latency Spike" - P2, single agent, brief - "Budget Overrun" - P1, cost-related incident ### Proactive/Agentic Behavior - After generating the postmortem, show a "Proactive Recommendations" section - Auto-detect patterns: if incident was P0, recommend adding circuit breakers; if detection was manual, recommend automated alerting; if multiple agents affected, recommend isolation boundaries - Show a "Similar Past Incidents" section (simulated) with pattern matching ### Style Requirements - Use the existing styles.css (link it) - Match the dark theme aesthetic of other pages - Include a header matching other pages with nav links (copy from index.html the header pattern with all the nav links, and add a link to postmortem.html labeled "🔍 Postmortem") - All interactivity in a single `
